findings.location: sections.s2 — Action の実装 code block
findings.description: Knowledge file uses `validateSample.abortIfInvalid()` but the source has `validateForSample.abortIfInvalid()`. The name `validateSample` does not appear anywhere in the source file.

The footnote in the source provides two code blocks: one for UserForm (parent, showing `@ValidateFor("multiInsert")` on `validateForMultiInsert`) and one for UserEntity (child, showing `@ValidateFor({"insert", "multiInsert"})`). The knowledge file only includes the UserEntity (child) side, omitting the UserForm (parent) code example that demonstrates how the parent specifies the shared string.
findings.source_evidence: Source footnote [#form_validate_for]: `public class UserForm { ... @ValidateFor("multiInsert") public static void validateForMultiInsert(ValidationContext<UserForm> context) { ... } }`

findings.description: `AddressEntity` is a PascalCase class used prominently in the UserForm code example and HTML form (form.address.*) but is absent from s1's hints.
`Entity1` (PascalCase class used throughout the fixed-array example) and `ValidationContext` (used in the validateForSample method signature) are missing from s2's hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `private Entity1[] entityArray;`, `public static void validateForSample(ValidationContext<Entity1> context)`
